title: carex longispiculata
intro: Carex longispiculata, a type of sedge plant, is a perennial herb native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Carex longispiculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular choice for traditional Chinese medicine.
